mapper.select: SELECT id, stage_id, paper, title, prompt_text, exam_year, image_url, material_text, source, is_active, created_at, updated_at FROM essay_prompt WHERE stage_id = #{stageId} AND is_active = 1 ORDER BY paper DESC

SELECT id, stage_id, paper, title, prompt_text, exam_year, image_url, material_text, source, is_active, created_at, updated_at FROM essay_prompt WHERE stage_id = #{stageId} AND paper = #{paper} LIMIT 1
SELECT DISTINCT exam_year FROM essay_prompt WHERE stage_id = #{stageId} AND is_active = 1 AND exam_year IS NOT NULL ORDER BY exam_year DESC
